level_signals: 3+ years of experience in technical program management

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 3+ years of experience in technical program management, enterprise software delivery, consulting, professional services, or customer implementations
Proven experience leading complex enterprise deployments involving integrations, multiple stakeholders, and cross-functional delivery teams
Strong technical credibility and comfort discussing integrations, APIs, infrastructure dependencies, and implementation trade-offs
Experience managing enterprise programs across Agile, Waterfall, and Hybrid delivery methodologies
Strong stakeholder management and executive communication skills with the ability to influence alignment across technical and business teams
Highly organized, execution-oriented, and comfortable operating in fast-paced, ambiguous environments
Strong ownership mindset with the ability to proactively drive issues to resolution and maintain delivery momentum

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Experience with conversational AI, LLMs, or enterprise AI deployments
Exposure to CCaaS platforms, APIs, or enterprise integrations such as Genesys, Five9, NICE, or Avaya
Experience supporting pre-sales scoping, SOW development, resource estimation, or delivery planning
PMP, Scrum Master, Agile, or related certifications
Experience working with SIs, GSIs, BPOs, or multi-region enterprise delivery programs
Passion for AI tooling, operational excellence, and delivery process optimization

scope.surface: End-to-end enterprise Agentic AI deployment delivery — from SOW kickoff through go-live and hypercare
primary_metrics_inferred: Delivery governance and operational process maturity
core_responsibilities: Own end-to-end delivery across scope, timeline, budget, quality, risks, and dependencies for enterprise AI deployments
Lead implementations from SOW kickoff through design, integration, UAT, production go-live, and hypercare
Drive execution across cross-functional delivery pods
Maintain project governance across project plans, RAID logs, milestone tracking, risk management, change requests, and escalation handling
Serve as the primary delivery contact for enterprise customer stakeholders, including executive sponsors and technical leaders
Coordinate technical delivery across integrations, infrastructure, environments, testing, and deployment readiness
Support pre-sales activities including delivery scoping, resource estimation, SOW reviews, and implementation risk assessment
Manage co-delivery execution with SIs, GSIs, BPOs, and external implementation partners
Mentor junior TPMs and help establish scalable delivery best practices

green_flags: Compensation range explicitly stated ($120K-$140K USD OTE base)
Clear ownership areas and success criteria defined in JD
Company has substantial traction (1B+ interactions, enterprise customers like Booking.com, Allianz, SAP)
Backed by top-tier investors (General Catalyst, EQT Ventures, Altimeter Capital)
Mentorship opportunity (mentor junior TPMs) signals career growth path
red_flags: Location not specified anywhere in the JD — remote, hybrid, or onsite status is entirely unclear
Work authorization and visa sponsorship not addressed despite US-based salary range and e-verify mention
Compensation described as OTE but the variable component split is not disclosed
No information on team size or current TPM headcount

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from years requirement and comp range)
seniority.manages_people (inferred from 'mentor junior TPMs' language — not formal management)
location.type (not stated anywhere in JD body; marked unclear)
scope.business_model (inferred from product description and enterprise deployment context)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from responsibilities and success criteria sections; not directly listed as metrics)
compensation.base_range_usd (JD states OTE range; assumed range represents base component but JD is ambiguous on base vs OTE split)
ambiguities: Compensation is described as 'On-Target Earnings (OTE), consisting of a base salary and performance-based variable component' but the $120K-$140K salary range label may refer to OTE total or base only — split is not clarified.
No location type is specified (remote, hybrid, onsite) despite a USD salary range and e-verify mention suggesting US-based role.
Visa sponsorship and work authorization are not addressed in the JD.
